Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 69 — — 4.8 out of 5 stars 36 4.4 out of 5 stars 230 — Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 Size One size 6-11 One size 4-8 One size 4-8 One size 6-11 One size 4-8 one size 4-8 Material Wool, Polyester, Spandex Wool, Polyester, Spandex Wool, Polyester, Spandex Polyester, Elastane Polyester, Spandex combed cotton, nylon, spandex Gender Men Women Women Men Women Women Keep Warm in Cold Winter ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data Hocerlu Men's Thermal Socks - The Perfect Companion for Cold Days Are you tired of freezing feet during the winter season? Look no further! Our Men's Thermal Socks are here to keep your feet warm and cozy all day long. Made from a wool and polyester blend, these socks are designed for superior insulation and comfort. The terry on the inside of the sock lock in heat and create a barrier against cold weather. Say goodbye to cold toes and hello to ultimate warmth! Elasticized Cuff Featuring an extended ribbed cuff, these socks provide extra protection and support for your legs. The elasticized cuff ensures a secure fit that stays in place all day, preventing discomfort or slipping. Say goodbye to saggy socks and hello to a snug and secure fit! Not only do these socks keep your feet toasty, but they also offer a snug fit that ensures maximum comfort. The reinforced heel and toe areas provide extra durability, making them perfect for indoor and outdoor activities. Stylish Design With their stylish design and versatile colour options, these thermal socks are functional and a fashion statement. They can be easily paired with any outfit, adding a touch of sophistication to your look. Whether you're lounging at home or braving the elements, our Men's Thermal Socks have got you covered.
